channel.title: Fascism on Marginalia
channel.description: Recent content in Fascism on Marginalia

item.title: Adolf Hitler's Ideology from Origins to Demise (1907--1945)
item.description: Adolf Hitler’s Ideology from Origins to Demise (1907–1945)

item.title: Death by Manager
item.description: A polemical essay arguing that the managerial class becomes a predatory power center across ideologies and should be dismantled through nonviolent, open-source-inspired alternatives.
